results.title: I hit 40 before I sorted out my pension. This is what I wished I’d known
Peacetime emergency declared in Minnesota as wildfires continue to burn
results.description: Gov. Tim Walz has declared a peacetime emergency as several wildfires continue to burn in central and northern Minnesota, KARE 11 reports. The fires are affecting portions Lake, Crow Wing, [...] The post Peacetime emergency declared in Minnesota as wildfires continue to burn appeared first on MinnPost .

results.title: EDITORIAL: Justice for Red Hill service members
results.description: After more than four years of health and legal battles, it’s heart-wrenching that service members have lost a significant ruling against their military employer for injuries caused by the Red Hill fuel crisis that poisoned the area’s water in 2021. Calling it an “overly harsh and unjust outcome,” U.S. District Judge Leslie E. Kobayashi nevertheless ruled last week that case law known as the “Feres doctrine” prohibited active-duty members from receiving any compensation from the government related to the fuel spills in May and November 2021. The post EDITORIAL: Justice for Red Hill service members appeared first on The Garden Island .

results.title: Kemi Badenoch’s kidding herself – the Tories are sliding into irrelevance
